conditions.critical_condition_basis: liquid chromatography at the critical point of adsorption

field_evidence.critical_condition_basis: The disappearance of the molar mass dependence of the retention time, corresponding to the critical conditions, was achieved at a composition of the mobile phase of acetonitrile—water (43:57, v/v)
field_evidence.critical_component: The mobile phase composition corresponding to the critical conditions for PEO was found to be acetonitrile-water (42:58, v/v) on a Chrompack RP-18 stationary phase
field_evidence.column_name: The column was Nucleosil 5C18 (250 x 4mm I.D.)

conditions.notes: Critical condition established for PEO block in a PEO-PPO block copolymer analysis. The text notes that the composition was adjusted from a previous RP-18 study to the Nucleosil 5C18 column.
conditions.corresponding_author_name: H. Pasch; C. Brinkmann; H. Much; U. Just
conditions.physical_address: Deutsches Kunststoff-Institut, Schlossgartenstrasse 6, W-6100 Darmstadt, Germany; Centre of Macromolecular Chemistry, Rudower Chaussee 5, O-1199, Berlin (Germany); Federal Institute of Materials Research and Testing, Department 3, Unter den Eichen 87, W-1000 Berlin 45 (Germany)

conditions.critical_condition_basis: The mobile phase composition corresponding to the critical conditions for PEO was found to be acetonitrile-water (43:57, v/v) on a Macherey-Nagel 5C; column

field_evidence.critical_condition_basis: The mobile phase composition corresponding to the critical conditions for PEO was found to be acetonitrile-water (43:57, v/v) on a Macherey-Nagel 5C; column

conditions.notes: Critical condition established for PEO block in a PEO-PPO block copolymer analysis.
